name: Scamanda
overview: Docuseries based on the podcast of the same name. The story of Amanda Riley — a wife, mother, blogger and Christian — whose tragic cancer tale captivates thousands. But Amanda has a secret that she's dying to keep, and after an anonymous tip to an investigative reporter, her own words may prove to be her downfall.

trailers.title: Official Trailer | Scamanda | Premieres Jan. 30 on ABC
